rds.dbinstance.processorfeature.CfnAbout: The `ProcessorFeature` property type specifies the processor features of a DB instance class status.

rds.dbinstance.processorfeature.Name.Description: The name of the processor feature. Valid names are `coreCount` and `threadsPerCore`.

rds.dbinstance.processorfeature.Value.Description: The value of a processor feature name.
